meanings.definition: not move; be in a resting position
take a short break from one's activities in order to relax

examples: Rest the dogs for a moment

meanings.definition: have a place in relation to something else
examples: The fate of Bosnia lies in the hands of the West
The responsibility rests with the Allies

meanings.definition: stay the same; remain in a certain state
examples: The dress remained wet after repeated attempts to dry it
He remained unmoved by her tears
The bad weather continued for another week

meanings.definition: put something in a resting position, as for support or steadying
examples: Rest your head on my shoulder
The birds perched high in the tree

meanings.definition: rest on or as if on a pillow

examples: The committee is resting over the summer

meanings.definition: not tired; refreshed as by sleeping or relaxing
examples: came back rested from her vacation
